definitions.text: handling eller hendelse som avgjør eller avslutter noe
definitions.translation: an action or event that decides or concludes something

examples.no: sette spikeren i kista for prosjektet
examples.en: put the final nail in the coffin for the project

examples.no: 2-0 ble spikeren i kista for laget
examples.en: 2-0 was the final nail in the coffin for the team
